articles.content:

articles.author: Darren Orf
articles.title: The Ocean’s Longest-Running Mystery Sings With a Voice No Creature Should Have - Yahoo
articles.description: For decades, a single whale has been calling out at a frequency no known species uses. Scientists still can’t find it.

articles.author: Anthony Wood
articles.title: Astrophotographer captures breathtaking view of 548 galaxies from a balcony - Space
articles.description: Over 60 hours of light data was used to create this stunning view of the gravitationally bound "Leo Triplet" galaxies.
